title: Grandmaster
content:
{{CharHub|Grandmaster|En Dwi Gast}} {{Character |image = Thor Ragnarok Textless Character Posters 06.jpg |real name = {{Conjecture|En Dwi Gast}}{{Ref|ConjecCode}} |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Grandmaster{{Ref|TR}} |organizational = The Original{{Ref|TR}}
The Creator of [[Sakaar]]{{Ref|TR}}
Father of the [[Contest of Champions]]{{Ref|TR}}
First Lost{{Ref|TR}}
First Found{{Ref|TR}}}} |species = |citizenship = {{Citizenship|SAK}} |gender = Male |movie = {{Infobox List|''[[Thor: Ragnarok]]''
{{Collapse|''[[Avengers: Infinity War]]'' (mentioned)
''[[Thor: Love and Thunder]]'' ([[List of Deleted Scenes|deleted scene]])}}}} |comic = {{Infobox List|{{Collapse|''[[Avengers: Endgame Prelude]]'' (mentioned)}}}} |actor = [[Jeff Goldblum]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|My name is Grandmaster. I preside over a little harlequinade called the [[Contest of Champions]]. People come from far and wide to unwillingly participate in it, and you, [[Thor|my friend]], might just be part of the new cast!|Grandmaster|Thor: Ragnarok}} '''{{Conjecture|En Dwi Gast}}''' is the ruler of [[Sakaar]] and a being with a fascination with gaming and manipulating lesser life-forms. Becoming stranded on the planet, he took the mantel of the flamboyant '''Grandmaster''', establishing a dictatorship over its citizens and keeping them distracted with a series of battles among some of his strongest slaves called the [[Contest of Champions]]. When Grandmaster took [[Thor]] as his new contender, he was soon horrified to learn that Thor already knew his current champion, [[Hulk]]. As Grandmaster feared, Thor soon escaped Sakaar with Hulk, resulting in a new uprising which resulted in him losing his position over the people of Sakaar. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Fascination with Champions==== Grandmaster was born shortly after the beginning of the universe alongside his brother, [[Taneleer Tivan]]. While his brother became obsessed with collecting objects of all kinds, Grandmaster became obsessed with manipulating life-forms into fighting each other nearly to death. ===[[Contest of Champions]]=== ====Ruling over Sakaar==== {{Quote|He is the original, the first lost and found. The creator of [[Sakaar]] and father of the [[Contest of Champions]].|Hologram Informant|Thor: Ragnarok}} [[File:Thor Ragnarok-GrandmasterFindingSakaar.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster ruling over the planet [[Sakaar]]]] Grandmaster became the ruler of the planet [[Sakaar]] and became a tyrant. He presided over the [[Contest of Champions]], a gladiatorial event held in an arena where slaves would be subject to battle. Grandmaster later hired a surviving [[Asgardian]] [[Valkyrie (Team)|Valkyrie]] designated as [[Scrapper 142]], who became a bodyguard of his alongside [[Topaz]].{{Ref|TR}} Amongst those Grandmaster imprisoned for his Contest of Champions included [[Beta Ray Bill]], [[Ares]], [[Bi-Beast]], [[Dark-Crawler]], [[Man-Thing]],[https://screenrant.com/thor-3-ragnarok-easter-egg-beta-ray-bill/ Kevin Feige Reveals Thor: Ragnarok's Biggest Easter Egg] [[Korg]], [[Miek]], [[Biff (Rebellion)|Biff]], [[Hajo]], [[Roscoe]], [[Tasba]], and [[Doug (Gladiator)|Doug]]. In [[2015]], [[Hulk]] arrived on Sakaar. Hulk later was recognized as one of the new champions in the contest, he would then become truly beloved although remaining a prisoner.{{Ref|TR}} ====Enslaving Thor==== [[File:Thor Ragnarok 70.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster introducing himself to [[Thor]]]] {{Quote|What have you brought me today? Tell me."
"A [[Thor|contender]].|Grandmaster and [[Valkyrie]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} Following [[Odin]]'s passing in [[Norway]], resulting in the liberation of his firstborn [[Hela]] from [[Hel]] and the destruction of [[Mjølnir]] in her hands, [[Loki]] asked [[Volstagg]] to transport them back to [[Asgard]]. However, Hela kicked Loki and [[Thor]] out of the [[Bifrost Bridge]], causing them to crash land on [[Sakaar]]. Because time flows differently in Sakaar, Loki arrived two weeks before Thor, even though, to Thor, it had been less than a day. [[File:Lord of Thunder.png|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster is impressed by [[Thor]]'s powers]] Loki managed to win Grandmaster's favor over time, becoming his new ally. When [[Valkyrie|Scrapper 142]] discovered Thor, he was taken through a tunnel before being jolted from seeing Grandmaster and [[Topaz]]. Grandmaster asked Scrapper 142 if he was any kind of a fighter, prompting Thor to demand his release as he stated that he is not for sale. However, Grandmaster proceeded on taking Thor for ten million units and was pecked on the cheek. [[File:Thor Ragnarok 135.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster greets [[Carlo (Cousin)|Carlo]] before killing him]] Looking for any abilities, Grandmaster inquired information on Thor and who he was. Thor would then rip off his handcuffs again and proclaim himself as the God of Thunder. Grandmaster then ridiculed Thor commenting on the absence of thunder and appearance of sparkles. Grandmaster would then took Thor to meet his cousin [[Carlo (Cousin)|Carlo]], who attempted to make his escape from Sakaar only to be captured. Momentarily making Carlo desperately begged for his life, Grandmaster pardoned him, only to reveal that he was being pardoned from life. He was then killed using the [[Melt Stick]]. [[File:Thor Ragnarok-Thor&LokiListentotheGrandmaster.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster interrupting [[Thor]] and [[Loki]]]] While having properly introduced himself and explained the [[Contest of Champions]], Grandmaster was throwing a party, serving as a DJ. Thor would then notice Loki and promptly whisper concern to him. Loki would explain that he has already been here for two weeks. Grandmaster asked why Loki was whispering to Thor then explain to them that time worked differently around Sakaar, citing his millions of years of age. Loki then insisted that he had never met Thor before being interrupted with the fact they were brothers. Loki then added that he himself was adopted. [[File:Grandmaster-TheirFreedonTheyShallWin.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster explaining his deals to [[Thor]]]] Grandmaster then inquiring Thor on his fighting ability, was threatened by a freedom-wanting Thor. Grandmaster mocked him then explained that the only way he could have his freedom was if he was able to defeat the Contest of Champions' [[Hulk|ultimate champion]]. Thor was confident in his ability and was swiftly taken to the cell where the gladiators were located.{{Ref|TR}} ====Hulk vs. Thor==== [[File:Thor Ragnarok 97.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster announces the next match]] {{Quote|It's main event time. Making his first appearance, though he looks quite promising, got a couple of tricks up his sleeve. I'll say no more, see what you think. Ladies and gentlemen, I give you... [[Thor|Lord of Thunder]]. Watch out for his fingers. They make sparks.|Grandmaster|Thor: Ragnarok}} With the audience cheering, Grandmaster introduced [[Thor]] as the Lord of Thunder while his champion prepared to arrive. As he built up his entrance, Grandmaster had finally introduced his fellow champion as none other than [[Hulk]], whom Thor had not seen since the [[Battle of Sokovia]] in [[2015]]. [[File:Thor Ragnarok Teaser 52.png|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster watches [[Thor]] fighting [[Hulk]]]] [[Loki]] watched from above as, to his shock and horror, the Hulk appeared. He then started to walk out due to the fear of their [[Battle of New York|previous encounter]]. The Grandmaster forbade this act and commanded Loki stay and watch. Grandmaster became aware of Thor's close ties with the Hulk and attentively continued watching the fight as Thor and Hulk [[Duel in the Grand Arena|furiously battled]] each other. [[File:GrandmasterDisappointedWithTheFight.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster is shocked by [[Thor]]'s powers]] When Thor had managed to land a heavy blow against Hulk, he attempted to use [[Black Widow]]'s lullaby to calm him down, only for Hulk to smash Thor into the ground, much to Loki's delight. Grandmaster kept on watching as Thor and Hulk continued fighting, until Thor unexpectedly gained a sudden surge of his power, allowing his entire body to be engulfed with lightning as he struck Hulk and damaged his [[Sakaaran Battle Armor]]. [[File:Grandmaster Obedience Disk.png|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster tasers [[Thor]] during the match]] Unwilling to watch his beloved Champion be defeated, Grandmaster activated Thor's [[Obedience Disk]], causing Thor to fall to the floor, allowing Hulk to finally win the duel. After the arena fight, Thor continued to be held captive by the Grandmaster, sharing room with Hulk. He would then hear news of Thor's escape. He then feared Thor had captured his beloved champion.{{Ref|TR}} ====Hunting Thor==== [[File:GrandmasterLokiValkyrie-RedRoom.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster orders [[Valkyrie|142]] and [[Loki]] to find [[Hulk]]]] {{Quote|You know what? I woke up this morning thinking about a public execution. But for now, I'll settle for this sweet little 'who's gonna get [[Thor|him]] first?' So, you're on the clock!|Grandmaster to [[Loki]] and [[Valkyrie]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} Grandmaster then ordered a celebration of his champion to hopefully draw him out. Furious, Grandmaster ordered [[Valkyrie|Scrapper 142]] and [[Loki]] to find the two. The two come to blows when Loki started inquiring about the deaths of her fellow Valkyries. 142 would then assist Thor, holding Loki hostage as a sign of her allegiance. [[File:Thor Ragnarok-Grandmaster&TopazTalkabouttheRevolution.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster is informed of the Revolution]] Unbeknownst to Grandmaster, a certain [[Revengers|group]] then liberated the other gladiators who, led by [[Korg]] and [[Miek]], staged a revolt. Discovering the news of a revolution, Grandmaster questioned [[Topaz]] of how something of this scale could happen. He was then notified that the [[Obedience Disk]]s had been deactivated. Grandmaster then ordered his troops to escape quickly.{{Ref|TR}} ====Revolution in Sakaar==== [[File:Thor Ragnarok-GrandmastersAnnouncement.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster leading the manhunt for [[Thor]]]] {{Quote|I'm proud of you all, this revolution has been a huge success. Yay us! Pat, pat on the back. Pat on the back. Come on. No? Me, too. 'Cause I've been a big part of it. Can't have a revolution without somebody to overthrow! So, ah, you're welcome.|Grandmaster|Thor: Ragnarok}} Using a holographic projection, Grandmaster announced that [[Thor]] had escaped and ordered the people and his bodyguards to not let him leave the planet. Meanwhile, Thor used the ''[[Commodore]]'' to head to the [[Devil's Anus]]. [[Topaz]] and the Grandmaster's bodyguards swiftly chased [[Revengers|them]] as they managed to avoid Grandmaster's guards and escape from [[Sakaar]]. Loki was soon found by the gladiators. [[File:Thor-Ragnarok-post-credit.png|{{AltFloat}}|Grandmaster claiming a neutral compromise]] After the great uprising, Grandmaster was ultimately defeated by the people, and he confronted his subjects, who were still fighting the revolution started by the gladiators. Trying to set the record straight, Grandmaster claimed that the revolution was a tie, noting that he was an integral part of their uprising since without him, they would have nothing to rebel against.{{Ref|TR}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|Time works real different around these parts. On any other world, I would be millions of years old. But here on [[Sakaar]]...|Grandmaster|Thor: Ragnarok}} *'''Immortality''': Grandmaster has an extraordinarily long lifespan, stating himself to be millions of years old. *'''Telepathy''': Grandmaster has the ability to read people's minds.[https://soundcloud.com/begleyesque/going-green-with-jeff-goldblum Going Green with Jeff Goldblum] ===Abilities=== *'''Master Tactician''': Grandmaster was able to build [[Sakaar]] up from the ground in popularity with his [[Contest of Champions]]. His game gained many followers and popularity on the planet. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== {{Quote|This is my Melting Stick. Yeah, if people displease me, I can melt them.|Grandmaster|Marvel One-Shot: Team Darryl}} *'''[[Melt Stick]]''': [[File:CarloDeath.png|thumb|250px|Grandmaster kills [[Carlo (Cousin)|Carlo]] with his [[Melt Stick]]]] The Melt Stick is Grandmaster's weapon of choice, using it to melt those who displease him like [[Carlo (Cousin)|Carlo]]. Despite taking great pleasure in using the Melt Stick, Grandmaster insisted that it only be used for capital offenses, refusing to execute [[Loki]] for merely interrupting him during their exchange despite [[Topaz]] offering him the weapon. *'''[[Obedience Disk]]''': Grandmaster had used the Obedience disks to force all of his own gladiators to participate during the [[Contest of Champions]], using the Disk to disable [[Thor]] to ensure [[Hulk]] would be victorious. ===Vehicles=== {{Quote|Grandmaster uses it for his good times, orgies and stuff."
"Did she just say the Grandmaster uses it for orgies?"
"Yeah. Don’t touch anything.|[[Valkyrie]], [[Bruce Banner]], and [[Thor]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} *'''''[[Commodore]]''''': Grandmaster mainly used this ship for parties and orgies. *'''''[[Statesman]]''''': Grandmaster formerly owned the ''Statesman'', a massive spaceship, that was later used by [[Loki]] and the [[Sakaaran Rebellion]] to escape [[Sakaar]]. ==Facilities== *'''[[Grandmaster Palace]]''': The Grandmaster used to reside in his palace before his former subjects ousted him in rebellion. *'''[[Grand Arena]]''': The Grandmaster created a massive, elaborate arena to host the [[Contest of Champions]] as a mean to entertain himself and his subjects. ==Relationships== {{col-begin}}{{col-2}} ===Family=== *[[Collector|Taneleer Tivan/Collector]] - Brother *[[Carlo (Cousin)|Carlo]] † - Cousin and Victim ===Allies=== *[[Sakaaran Guards]] - Subordinates **[[Topaz]] † - Bodyguard *[[Beta Ray Bill]] - Former Champion *[[Ares]] - Former Champion *[[Bi-Beast]] - Former Champion *[[Dark-Crawler]] - Former Champion *[[Lead Scrapper]] † *[[Beerbot 5000]] {{col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[Man-Thing|Ted Sallis/Man-Thing]] - Former Champion *[[Revengers]] **[[Thor]] - Former Prisoner **[[Hulk|Bruce Banner/Hulk]] - Former Champion **[[Loki]] † - Former Ally **[[Valkyrie|Brunhilde/Valkyrie]] - Former Ally *[[Sakaaran Rebellion]] - Former Prisoners **[[Korg]] **[[Miek]] **[[Biff (Rebellion)|Biff]] **[[Tasba]] **[[Roscoe]] † **[[Hajo]] † *[[Doug (Gladiator)|Doug]] † - Former Prisoner *[[Sakaaran Scrappers]] - Former Allies {{col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|TR}} *{{Appearance|AIW}} (mentioned) **{{Appearance|AEP3}} (mentioned) ==Trivia== *In the comics, the Grandmaster, along with the [[Collector]], is one of the [[:w:c:marvel:Elders of the Universe|Elders of the Universe]]. In a [[Contest of Champions|competition]] with the [[Cosmic Entities|cosmic entity]] [[Death]], he captured various heroes from [[Earth]] and forced them to fight against each other. He was also the custodian of the [[Mind Stone]] before [[Thanos]] took it for the [[Infinity Gauntlet]]. His real name is also revealed to be '''En Dwi Gast'''. **Grandmaster's role in ''[[Thor: Ragnarok]]'' is analogue to the '''[[Red King]]''', the ruler of the [[:w:c:marvel:Sakaaran Imperials|Sakaaran Imperials]] and master of the [[Grand Arena]], in the [[:w:c:marvel:Planet Hulk|Planet Hulk]] storyline. *[[Jeff Goldblum]], as Grandmaster, can be seen dancing in the end credits of ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2]]''. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Jeff Goldblum]] described the character as ''"a hedonist, a pleasure-seeker, an enjoyer of life and tastes and smells."'' He also said that director [[Taika Waititi]] encouraged improvisation in order for Goldblum to "make the character his own".[http://www.newsarama.com/29621-jeff-goldblum-describes-marvel-s-grandmaster-as-a-hedonist-a-pleasure-seeker.html JEFF GOLDBLUM Describes MARVEL'S GRANDMASTER As 'A Hedonist, A Pleasure-Seeker'] *[[Jeff Goldblum]] revealed on an interview that Grandmaster was born shortly after the [[Big Bang]] and is 14 million years old; however, the Big Bang occurred 13.8 billion years ago.[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yRwSdoRqax4 Thor 3 Ragnarok - B-Roll, Bloopers and Behind the Scenes (2017)] *Unlike his appearance in the comics, Grandmaster does not have blue skin. This is because the filmmakers did not want to detract from [[Jeff Goldblum]]'s personality by concealing his appearance, especially since Goldblum had already played a blue-colored character in {{WPS|Earth Girls Are Easy}}.[http://au.ign.com/articles/2017/04/20/why-jeff-goldblum-doesnt-resemble-marvel-comics-grandmaster-in-thor-ragnarok WHY JEFF GOLDBLUM DOESN'T RESEMBLE MARVEL COMICS' GRANDMASTER IN ''THOR: RAGNAROK''] *[[Jeff Goldblum]] stated that Grandmaster survived the events of ''[[Avengers: Infinity War]]'', saying: ''"You can't kill me, I'm like a [[Vampires|vampire]]."''[http://www.digitalspy.com/movies/the-avengers/news/a859041/avengers-infinity-war-grandmaster-alive-thor-ragnarok-jeff-goldblum-jurassic-world/ Grandmaster is still alive after ''Avengers: Infinity War'' according to Jeff Goldblum] *[[Jeff Goldblum]] shot scenes reprising the role of Grandmaster in ''[[Thor: Love and Thunder]]'', but they were eventually cut from the final film.[https://movieweb.com/christian-bale-reveals-thor-love-and-thunder-cut-scenes-peter-dinklage-jeff-goldblum/ Christian Bale Reveals Thor: Love and Thunder Cut Scenes Featuring Peter Dinklage and Jeff Goldblum] ==References== {{Gallery|Grandmaster/Gallery}} {{Wq|Grandmaster}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel|Red King}} *{{WP|Grandmaster (Marvel Comics)|Grandmaster}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/grandmaster}} [[es:En Dwi Gast]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Thor: Ragnarok Characters]] [[Category:Thor: Love and Thunder Characters]] [[Category:Unknown Race]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Gray Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]]
